success_criteria_results.source_phrase: QA `manifest_verification` 用空 active 集刷绿 …… 下一周期加守卫（active_tests_count==0 时禁止 pytest_collected_ok:true，或者强制把 cycle-diff 文件加入 active 集）。
success_criteria_results.criterion: AC1 + AC3 + AC4 + AC5 — vacuity guard rejects smoking-gun shape AND force-include rule promotes cycle-diff pytest-collectable files into active set
success_criteria_results.verification_method: Live subprocess execution of scripts/qa-manifest-guard.py with all 7 manifest-mode fixtures (AC1 + AC4) and all 6 cycle-diff cases (AC5); static-text structural-anchor scan of agents/qa.md Phase 5 (AC3, 8 assertions); per-task pytest run.
success_criteria_results.details: AC1: smoking_gun fixture exit=2 verdict=vacuous_rejected; valid_non_vacuous fixture exit=0 verdict=ok; explicit_vacuous fixture exit=0 verdict=ok_vacuous_acknowledged. AC3: token_in_procedural_region=1, forbid_phrase_in_procedural=true (matched via MUST NOT), guard_script_reference=3, exit2/qa.status/fail regex matches, primary_cause/qa_oversight within 200 chars, qa.failures within 600 chars of exit-code-2, no_smoking_gun_example confirmed. AC4: all 4 vacuous shapes (smoking_gun, true+nonempty_failures, missing_failures_field, null_but_undeclared) → exit 2 vacuous_rejected. AC5: force_include_one_collectable exit=0 active_tests_count=1; empty_diff exit=0 vacuous_acknowledged; no_py_files exit=0 vacuous_acknowledged; missing_collect_only_cmd exit=3 guard_blocked; missing_cycle_diff_files exit=3 guard_blocked; bogus_command exit=3 guard_blocked.
success_criteria_results.evidence: All 19 AC1/AC3/AC4/AC5 sub-checks verified live via subprocess. Pytest suite: 26/26 pass.

success_criteria_results.source_phrase: venv 全 broken symlink …… 修这个 = 同时可能消除 #1 的诱因。
success_criteria_results.criterion: AC2 — repair script makes ALL THREE symlinks pytest-runnable, eliminates broken symlinks, verifies interpreter is in venv, and is idempotent
success_criteria_results.verification_method: Live subprocess execution: pytest --version on all three symlinks; broken-symlink finder; sys.prefix probe; idempotent mtime preservation; no-hardcoded-target grep.
success_criteria_results.details: /root/.claude/venv/bin/python -m pytest --version → 'pytest 9.0.3' exit 0. Same for python3 and python3.12. find /root/.claude/venv/bin -maxdepth 1 -name 'python*' -type l -xtype l → empty. python -c 'sys.prefix.endswith("venv")' → exit 0, sys.prefix=/root/.claude/venv. bash scripts/repair-venv.sh on healthy venv → exit 0 with stdout 'already healthy: ...', mtime 1780045139 == 1780045139 preserved. grep -E '/usr/bin/python3\.[0-9]+' excluding comments and pyvenv.cfg references → 0 matches.
